<!-- Thanks for your PR! Please fill this in so reviewers can land it fast. -->

## Description

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issues. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (would affect existing users)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation only
- [ ] 🔧 Chore / refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] 🧪 Test only

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `claude plugin validate .` passes locally
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under the `[Unreleased]` section
- [ ] Docs updated (README / blueprint / inline comments) if behaviour changed
- [ ] Commit message follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org)
- [ ] PR is focused on a single concern

## Screenshots / output

<!-- For UI / CLI output changes, paste a screenshot or terminal capture. -->
